macro_segments.title: The Competing Measures: Multiple Rabbinical Positions on Time Duration

micro_segments.title: Rabbi Yishmael: Kedei Hakafat Dekel (Time to Walk Around a Palm Tree)

Rabbi Yehoshua: Kedei Lishtoto (Time to Drink the Cup)
Ben Azzai: Kedei Litzlot Beitzah (Time to Fry an Egg)

Rabbi Yehuda ben Beteira: Kedei Ligmoa Shalosh Beitzim (Three Eggs Sequentially)
Rabbi Elazar ben Yirmiah: Kedei Likshor Girdei Nima (Tying String Ends Together)
Ben Chanin ben Pinchas: Kedei Yad el Peh (Hand to Mouth for Splinter Removal)
